tasks.label: Clean & Build (refresh dependencies)
tasks.detail: Runs the Gradle tasks to clean the output directory and build with refreshed dependencies

tasks.label: Build Shadow JAR
tasks.detail: Runs the Gradle task to build a Shadow JAR

tasks.label: Build & Run Shadow JAR (Windows JVM)
tasks.detail: Builds a Shadow JAR and runs it in the Windows JVM

tasks.label: Patch Version
tasks.detail: Increments the patch version and commits it, eg. x.y.z -> x.y.(z+1)

tasks.label: Minor Version
tasks.detail: Increments the minor version and commits it, eg. x.y.z -> x.(y+1).0

tasks.label: Major Version
tasks.detail: Increments the major version and commits it, eg. x.y.z -> (x+1).0.0
